commandPalette.placeholder: Type to search domains, bindings, agents, prompts…
commandPalette.hint: Up/Down to navigate · Enter to open · Esc to close

auth.patPrompt: Paste your Gitea personal access token to continue.
auth.storageNote: stored in session storage · cleared when this tab closes
auth.forbidden: Your account is not in the admin team.

domains.title: Domains
domains.subtitle: Knowledge surfaces compiled by opencoo.
domains.empty: No domains yet — bind a source to get started.

emptyState.title: No domains yet
emptyState.body: Create your first knowledge domain. opencoo provisions a Gitea repo, seeds index/log/schema, and the domain becomes the target for source bindings and agent instances.

create.title: New domain
create.subtitle: Provisions a Gitea repo and seeds index/log/schema.

help.slug: lowercase, digits, hyphens — starts with a letter (1–63 chars)

errors.generic: Could not create domain. Try again or check the audit log.

detail.title: Domain
detail.subtitle: Edit metadata, retire, or hard-delete this domain.

help.retentionDays: How long to keep this domain's intake + LLM-debug rows before cleanup prunes them. 1–365 days, or blank to fall back to the engine default.
help.governanceCadence: How often a human reviewer is expected to walk this domain's compiled pages — drives the heartbeat agent's surfacing cadence.
help.reviewRole: Free-form label naming the role that signs off on this domain's reviews. Surfaced in the heartbeat and audit log; never used as an authz check.
help.worldviewEnabled: When on, the trigger pipeline enqueues worldview.md recompiles for this domain. Turning off stops future recompiles; in-flight queue jobs run to completion.
help.llmBudgetMonthlyCapUsd: Soft monthly USD cap on LLM spend for this domain. Reports flag overshoots; blank = no cap.

actions.confirmDisableBody: Soft-disables the domain. The Gitea repo is kept, but the domain is hidden from listings and ingestion stops dispatching to it. Re-enable is not in v0.1 — to recover you create a fresh domain.
actions.confirmDeleteBody: Removes the domain row from opencoo's database. The Gitea repo is NOT deleted — remove it separately if no longer needed. Append-only audit (page citations, redaction events) referencing this domain stays in place.
actions.confirmDeleteCheckbox: I understand this is permanent and the Gitea repo is not removed.
actions.deleteBlocked: Disable bindings first — see Sources tab. ({{n}} binding(s) reference this domain.)

errors.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Try again or check the audit log.
errors.aggregatorAlreadySet: Another active domain is already the aggregator. Disable that one first.
errors.disableFailed: Could not disable domain (server rejected the request).
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete domain (server rejected the request).
errors.deleteFkRestricted: This domain has source bindings. Migrate or delete those first.
errors.recompileWorldviewFailed: Could not queue a worldview recompile. Try again or check the audit log.
errors.retentionInvalid: Retention must be a whole number of days, or blank to clear.
errors.retentionRange: Retention must be between 1 and 365 days.
errors.reviewRoleTooLong: Review role must be 64 characters or fewer.
errors.llmBudgetInvalid: LLM budget cap must be a number, or blank to clear.
errors.llmBudgetRange: LLM budget cap must be between 0 and 100,000 USD.
errors.auth: Sign-in expired or insufficient permissions — re-paste your PAT.
errors.transient: Server is unreachable or returned an error. Try again.

sources.title: Sources
sources.subtitle: Bindings that ingest into a domain.

emptyState.title: No source bindings yet
emptyState.body: Connect a Google Drive, Asana, or webhook source so opencoo has documents to ingest. Each binding ships into a domain you've already created.

create.title: New source binding
create.subtitle: Pick an adapter, target a domain, paste credentials.

errors.generic: Could not create binding. Try again or check the audit log.

allowedPaths.title: Allowed wiki paths
allowedPaths.subtitle: Subtree globs the classifier may write into. Empty or wildcard-only lists are rejected — pick at least one bounded subtree.
allowedPaths.empty: No paths yet. Add a chip from the suggestions or type your own.

detail.title: Source binding
detail.subtitle: Webhook URL, recent activity, and lifecycle actions.

copy.manualHint: Select the URL above and copy manually.

actions.confirmDisableBody: Inbound webhook events will still be accepted (HMAC verified, audit row written) but the scanner queue will not dispatch them, so no compile fires.
actions.confirmEnableBody: Once re-enabled, queued and incoming events will resume compile dispatch.
actions.confirmDeleteBody: Removes the binding row and clears its webhook events and ingestion intake history. Append-only audit (page citations, redaction events) is retained — if it blocks the delete, disable the binding instead.

scanNow.success: Scan queued — see the Activity tab.
scanNow.disabled: Enable the binding before queuing a scan.

retryFailed.success: Re-enqueued {{count}} failed job(s) — see the Activity tab.

errors.patchFailed: Could not update the binding. Try again or check the audit log.
errors.disableFailed: Could not disable binding (server rejected the request).
errors.enableFailed: Could not enable binding (server rejected the request).
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete binding (server rejected the request).
errors.deleteFkRestricted: This binding has audit history that prevents deletion. Disable it instead.
errors.scanNowFailed: Could not queue a scan. Try again or check the audit log.
errors.scanNowUnavailable: Scanner queue is not wired in this deployment — check engine logs.
errors.retryFailedFailed: Could not re-enqueue failed jobs. Try again or check the audit log.
errors.retryFailedUnavailable: Classify-retry surface is not wired in this deployment — check engine logs.
errors.auth: Sign-in expired or insufficient permissions — re-paste your PAT.
errors.transient: Server is unreachable or returned an error. Try again.

edit.title: Edit binding
edit.subtitle: Operational settings and credential rotation. Both apply to the next scheduled tick or webhook event.

config.title: Operational settings
config.subtitle: Adapter-specific config persisted on the binding row.

credentials.title: Rotate credentials
credentials.subtitle: Saving requires every field — rotation replaces the credential atomically.
credentials.banner: Rotating credentials does not pause the binding — in-flight events finish on the old key, new events use the new key.

errors.configFailed: Could not save operational settings. Check the field errors below.
errors.credentialsFailed: Could not rotate credentials. Check the field errors below.
errors.credentialsEmpty: Type at least one credential field before saving.
errors.webhookSecretNotSupported: This adapter has no webhook secret to rotate.
errors.auth: Sign-in expired or insufficient permissions — re-paste your PAT.
errors.transient: Server is unreachable or returned an error. Try again.

allowedPaths.title: Allowed wiki paths
allowedPaths.subtitle: Subtree globs the classifier may write into. The runtime guard rejects empty or wildcard-only lists.
allowedPaths.saveFailed: Could not save allowed paths. Try again or check the audit log.

retentionOverride.title: Retention override
retentionOverride.helper: Override the domain default ({{days}} days). Clear to revert.
retentionOverride.helperNoDomainDefault: Override the domain default. Clear to revert to the engine default.
retentionOverride.outOfRange: Retention must be an integer between 1 and 365 days.
retentionOverride.saveFailed: Could not save retention override. Try again or check the audit log.

notes.title: Notes
notes.helper: Operator-facing display label for this binding. Plain text, up to 4096 characters.
notes.emptyHint: Use Clear notes to remove the existing value.
notes.saveFailed: Could not save notes. Try again or check the audit log.

llmPolicy.title: LLM policy
llmPolicy.subtitle: Per-domain provider/model assignments. Diff-and-confirm before apply.
llmPolicy.empty: Select a domain to view its policy.
llmPolicy.tokenMismatch: The proposed policy changed since preview. Re-preview to continue.
llmPolicy.invalidJson: Proposed policy is not valid JSON.
llmPolicy.applied: Applied. New policy is active for new pipeline runs.

editor.localOnly: local-only — reject any cloud-provider call for this domain
editor.catalogUnavailable: catalog unavailable — paste the model id directly
editor.incomplete: policy incomplete — pick a model for every tier

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Versioned prompts shipped with this build.
prompts.subtitleEditor: Per-domain override editor. Pick a prompt to fork from the shipped baseline.

diffBanner.title_one: prompt has a new default available

editor.empty: Pick a prompt on the left to view or override its body.
editor.staleBadge: Override based on outdated baseline v{{baseline}}
editor.driftBanner: Shipped baseline changed since preview: v{{preview}} → v{{current}}. Re-fork from the new baseline to continue.
editor.appliedToast: Override applied. New body is live for this domain's pipeline runs.
editor.revertedToast: Override removed. The domain now uses the shipped baseline.
editor.revertConfirmBody: This deletes the override for {{name}} on this domain + locale. The shipped baseline takes effect immediately. The audit log records the deletion; the prior body is not recoverable.
editor.revertAck: I understand the override body is unrecoverable

errors.payloadMismatch: The body changed between preview and apply. Re-preview to continue.
errors.expired: Sovereignty token expired. Re-preview to continue.
errors.signatureMismatch: Sovereignty token tampered. Re-preview to continue.
errors.driftFallback: Shipped baseline drifted; click Re-fork from new baseline.

debug.title: What was actually sent
debug.disabledBanner: LLM_DEBUG_LOG=1 is not set on this deployment. Set the env var and restart to record the bodies that the LLM router assembles.
debug.emptyBanner: No runs recorded yet for this prompt × domain.

reviewMode.label: review mode
reviewMode.body: How ingested documents from this binding land in the wiki. `auto` writes them straight through; `review` queues every page in the Review tab for a human sign-off before publish; `approve` is a stricter variant — Lint must also pass before review opens. Stricter modes slow throughput but catch wrong-domain routing earlier.

allowedPaths.label: allowed paths
allowedPaths.body: Glob patterns that gate which files in the source this binding will ever ingest. Empty list = nothing ingests (the binding is paused). Patterns are matched against the source's native path format; `**` matches across directories. Tighten this to restrict an adapter to a folder instead of the whole drive.

scopeDomainIds.label: scope domains
scopeDomainIds.body: The domains this agent instance is allowed to read from and write to. Pick at least one; at most twenty. The instance refuses tools that touch any other domain at runtime — this is the boundary that keeps an HR agent out of the executive wiki.

worldviewEnabled.label: worldview compilation
worldviewEnabled.body: When on, the trigger pipeline enqueues `worldview.md` recompiles for this domain so agents have a bounded, Thinker-compiled summary in their system prompt. Turning off stops future recompiles; the existing worldview file stays in Gitea until cleaned up manually.

governanceCadence.label: governance cadence
governanceCadence.body: How often a human reviewer is expected to walk this domain's compiled pages. Drives the heartbeat agent's surfacing cadence and shows on the Reports timeline. Choose `weekly` for high-velocity domains, `quarterly` for archival ones.

emptyState.title: No activity yet
emptyState.body: Activity will stream here as agents run and sources fire. Once a heartbeat compiles or a binding scans, lifecycle events land in the feed below.

authFailed.title: Sign-in expired
authFailed.body: Re-paste your PAT to reconnect to the activity feed.

review.title: Review

emptyState.title: No review items pending
emptyState.body: Review queue is empty. As source bindings request approval, lint findings surface, or the Surfacer proposes automation candidates, items will appear in the sub-tabs below.

review.upcoming: skill candidates (phase-b) and marketplace updates (phase-c) ship later

sovereigntyConfirm.title: LLM policy — sovereignty diff
sovereigntyConfirm.body: Approving "{{name}}" may change the effective LLM routing for this binding. Confirm to continue.

heartbeat.errorHelp: Re-check that your PAT is still valid, then refresh.

diagnostics.title: Heartbeat status
diagnostics.healthy: Heartbeat chain looks healthy — runs are completing with output. No reports in the visible window yet.

disabled.label: Heartbeat instance exists but is disabled.

noOutputChannels.label: Heartbeat instance has no output channels bound.

noRuns.label: Heartbeat instance has never completed a run.

outputNull.label: Heartbeat run completed but produced no output. Last run: {{when}}.

runInFlight.label: Heartbeat run is still in progress. Started: {{when}}.

runFailed.label: Most recent run ended as {{status}}. Last run: {{when}}.

redaction.errorHelp: Re-check that your PAT is still valid, then refresh.

debug.bannerLabel: LLM_DEBUG_LOG=1 · prompts and responses are mirroring to llm_usage_debug

forgetImpact.title: Forget source
forgetImpact.lead: This will permanently remove this source's contributions from the wiki.
forgetImpact.summary: Impact: {{recompile}} pages re-compile, {{deletes}} pages delete entirely, {{citations}} citations removed.
forgetImpact.capExceeded: Cannot forget — would exceed today's delete cap ({{cap}}/day). Wait for the cap to reset.
forgetImpact.acknowledge: I understand {{recompile}} pages will recompile and {{deletes}} will delete permanently

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Append-only record of every state-changing admin action.
audit.scopeAside: Records who changed what, when. Reads are also recorded so the trail can't be mined silently. Metadata is sanitised at write time — secret bytes never reach this view.

emptyState.title: No audit entries yet
emptyState.body: Audit history will populate as operators make changes. Every state-changing admin action is recorded here, sanitised at write time so secret bytes never reach this view.

filters.resourcePlaceholder: slug, binding id, or domain id

audit.empty: No audit-log rows match the current filters.
audit.loadError: Could not load audit log. Try again.

cost.subtitle: Per-domain spend, projected month-end, tier split.

burndown.title: Burn-down per domain
burndown.subtitle: Month-to-date usage against the per-domain monthly cap.

tierSplit.subtitle: Three-tier split for the selected period.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Schedule cadence, enable/disable, and bind output channels per agent instance.
agents.empty: No agent instances yet — seed via the opencoo CLI.

emptyState.title: No agent instances yet
emptyState.body: Seed a heartbeat, lint, or chat agent for a domain. Instances carry the cadence, prompt overrides, and output channel bindings that decide what opencoo runs on your behalf.

multiSelectDomains.empty: No active domains available — create one on the Domains tab first.

detail.title: Agent instance
detail.outputChannelsEmpty: No output channels available — add one in the Outputs tab first.
detail.scheduleCronHint: 5-field UTC cron pattern. Example: 0 6 * * 1-5 (every weekday 06:00 UTC).
detail.name: Name
detail.memoryClearHint: Wipes this instance's persisted memory. The agent re-seeds from scratch on the next run.
detail.memoryClearConfirmBody: Clearing memory removes the agent's accumulated context. Useful when a stuck instance carries stale state into every run; irreversible.
detail.memoryClearAck: I understand this cannot be undone.
detail.promptsUnknownDefinition: No prompts mapped for this agent definition.
detail.promptInstanceRevertedToast: Instance override removed. The instance now falls back to the domain override (or shipped baseline).

errors.nameCollision: Another instance under this agent already uses that name.
errors.scopeRequired: Select at least one domain in scope.
errors.unknownScopeDomainIds: One or more selected domains no longer exist.
errors.duplicateScopeDomainIds: Duplicate domain in scope — pick each at most once.

create.title: New agent instance
create.subtitle: Seeds the agent_instances row dispatcher reads on next run.

help.name: 1–100 chars. Unique per (agent definition, name).
help.scope: Domains this instance reads / writes. At least one; at most 20.
help.scheduleCron: 5-field UTC cron pattern, e.g. 0 8 * * 1-5. Leave blank for an unscheduled instance.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.nameCollision: Another instance under this agent already uses that name.
errors.scopeRequired: Select at least one domain in scope.
errors.duplicateScopeDomainIds: Duplicate domain in scope — pick each at most once.
errors.invalidCron: Cron pattern is invalid. Use 5 space-separated fields.

errors.bindOutputsFailed: Could not save changes. Try again or check the audit log.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.subtitle: Delivery channels agents send their JSON output to.
outputs.empty: No output channels yet — add one to enable agent deliveries.

emptyState.title: No output channels yet
emptyState.body: Set up an Asana or webhook delivery target. Agents send their compiled JSON to bound channels — without one, heartbeats compile silently and never reach an operator.

detail.title: Output channel
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this channel? Bindings on agent instances become dangling.

bulkDelete.confirmBody_one: Deleting {{count}} channel is irreversible. Agent instances still bound to it skip delivery on the next dispatch.
bulkDelete.confirmBody_other: Deleting {{count}} channels is irreversible. Agent instances still bound to a deleted channel skip delivery on the next dispatch.
bulkDelete.confirmCheckboxLabel: I understand this cannot be undone.

errors.auth: Session expired. Sign in again to retry.

reports.lede: Today's signals from the agents you've configured.

prompts.lede: The instructions your agents follow. Adapt them per domain or per instance.

domains.lede: Each domain is its own wiki, its own LLM policy, its own access. Where your data lives.
